## Summary
Brief description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Syntax
```fajar
// How would this look in Fajar Lang?
```

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've considered.

## Context
- Which domain? (@kernel / @device / @safe / compiler / tooling)
- Is this available in Rust/Go/Zig/Mojo? How do they handle it?
